problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
